---
name: Feature / Refactor / Fix
about: A single unit of work producing one PR, part of a larger plan
title: "prefix(scope): short description"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What this issue achieves in one sentence.

## Changes

- `path/to/file.rs`: specific change
- `path/to/other.rs`: specific change

## Why

Why this change is needed, referencing architecture principles from AGENTS.md if applicable.

## Dependencies

- Requires #<issue-number> to be merged first (remove if none)

## Acceptance

- [ ] `cargo check --workspace` passes
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` passes
- [ ] Specific acceptance criteria for this issue
